phases.title: Before Delivery Prep
phases.description: Steps to take before you arrive. The Cybertruck has a unique stainless steel exoskeleton — understand what to look for.

items.title: VIN confirmed
items.description: Verify the VIN on the car matches your order confirmation.

items.title: Monroney sticker present
items.description: The price sticker should be on the window. Confirm trim level (Foundation Series, Cyberbeast, All-Wheel Drive).

items.title: Registration and title documents
items.description: Confirm all required registration and title documents are provided.

items.title: Trim level confirmed
items.description: Confirm the delivered Cybertruck matches your ordered trim: Foundation Series, Cyberbeast, or All-Wheel Drive.

items.title: Mobile Connector included
items.description: Confirm a Mobile Connector is present.

items.title: Floor mats present
items.description: Verify all floor mats are present and correctly fitted.

items.title: Bed liner present (if ordered)
items.description: If a bed liner was ordered, verify it is installed correctly in the vault.

phases.title: Locked Exterior
phases.description: Inspect the stainless steel exoskeleton and exterior. No paint to check — focus on steel finish, panel alignment, and gaps.

items.title: Panel gaps even
items.description: Walk around the vehicle and check all panel gaps are even and consistent. Cybertruck panels should have tight, precise gaps.

items.title: Panels flush
items.description: Check that all stainless steel panels sit flush with adjacent panels. No panel should protrude or be recessed noticeably.

items.title: Clamshell frunk gap even
items.description: The Cybertruck has a large one-piece clamshell frunk hood. Check the gap around the entire perimeter is consistent.

items.title: Tonneau cover gap even
items.description: Check the gap between the tonneau cover and the bed rails is even along the full length.

items.title: Front light bar alignment
items.description: Check the full-width front LED light bar for flush fit and even alignment with the body.

items.title: Rear light bar alignment
items.description: Check the full-width rear LED light bar for flush fit and even alignment with the tailgate.

items.title: No dents or dings in steel panels
items.description: Inspect all stainless steel panels for dents or dings. Unlike paint chips, steel dents are difficult to repair. Check at multiple lighting angles.

items.title: No deep scratches in steel
items.description: Inspect steel panels for deep gouges or scratches. Note: stainless steel naturally shows brushed finish marks — look for damage that goes against or through the grain.

items.title: Steel finish consistent
items.description: Verify the brushed stainless steel finish direction is consistent across all panels. Different grain patterns may indicate a replaced panel.

items.title: No steel panel warping or waves
items.description: Look across the vehicle at a shallow angle under good lighting. Steel panels should be flat with no waves or warping.

items.title: Windshield no chips or cracks
items.description: Inspect the entire large windshield for chips, cracks, or stress fractures.

items.title: Rear window intact
items.description: Check the rear windshield for chips or cracks.

items.title: Side windows intact
items.description: Inspect all side windows for chips or cracks.

items.title: Tesla T logo and badging correctly placed
items.description: Check Tesla T logo and any Cybertruck badging is centered, straight, and properly adhered.

items.title: Single wiper arm positioned correctly
items.description: Cybertruck has a single large wiper. Verify it is parked in the correct position and arm is not bent.

items.title: Wheel finish undamaged
items.description: Inspect all four wheels for curb rash, scratches, or finish damage.

items.title: Tires no damage
items.description: Check all four tires for sidewall damage, uneven wear, or embedded objects.

items.title: Tire pressure correct
items.description: Check that all tires appear correctly inflated. Confirm on dashboard after unlocking.

phases.title: Unlocked Exterior
phases.description: Inspect with doors open, frunk, vault, and tailgate accessible.

items.title: All doors open and close smoothly
items.description: Open and close all four doors. Each should open smoothly and latch firmly without excessive force.

items.title: Door seals seated correctly
items.description: Inspect rubber door seals for tears, misalignment, or areas that are not seated correctly.

items.title: Front light bar fully operational
items.description: Turn on headlights and verify the full-width front light bar operates in low beam, high beam, and DRL modes.

items.title: Rear light bar fully operational
items.description: Verify the full-width rear light bar functions for taillights, brake lights, and reverse lights.

items.title: Turn signals operational
items.description: Test all four turn signals and the hazard lights.

items.title: Clamshell frunk opens and closes correctly
items.description: Open and close the large clamshell frunk hood. It should open fully, stay open, and latch securely when closed.

items.title: Frunk interior undamaged
items.description: Inspect frunk interior panels and liner for damage. Check the frunk seal.

items.title: Frunk drain clear
items.description: Verify frunk drains are clear of debris.

items.title: Motorized tonneau cover opens and closes
items.description: Test the powered tonneau cover open and close cycle. It should move smoothly along its full travel and seal completely when closed.

items.title: Tonneau cover seals correctly
items.description: With the tonneau closed, check the seal along both bed rails and at the front and rear edges.

items.title: Tailgate operates correctly
items.description: Test tailgate opening and closing. Verify it latches securely. Test the powered lower step if equipped.

items.title: Bed surface undamaged
items.description: Inspect the steel bed floor and walls for dents, gouges, or damage.

items.title: 240V/120V outlets in vault functional
items.description: Test the 240V and 120V outlets in the truck bed. Verify they power on from the display.

phases.title: Interior and Controls
phases.description: Inspect the cabin, seats, trim, and all controls.

items.title: Front seats no damage
items.description: Inspect seat upholstery for cuts, stains, uneven stitching, or loose panels.

items.title: Rear seats no damage
items.description: Inspect rear seat upholstery and fold-flat mechanism.

items.title: Seat adjustment works
items.description: Test powered seat adjustment for all positions.

items.title: Seat heating works
items.description: Enable seat heating from the display and verify front seats heat.

items.title: Dashboard panels fit and flush
items.description: Check dashboard panels for consistent fit, gaps, or misalignment.

items.title: Door panels properly fitted
items.description: Check all four door panels for correct fit, no rattles, and no damage.

items.title: Headliner clean and fitted
items.description: Inspect headliner for stains, sagging, or loose edges.

items.title: Carpet clean and fitted
items.description: Check carpet for stains, tears, or misalignment.

items.title: Main 18.5-inch touchscreen functional
items.description: Power on and verify the large portrait-orientation touchscreen responds accurately to touch across the entire surface.

items.title: No dead pixels on screen
items.description: Check for dead or stuck pixels across the main display at different brightness levels.

items.title: Rear passenger screen functional
items.description: Verify the rear display powers on and responds to touch.

items.title: Steering wheel controls responsive
items.description: Test scroll wheels and buttons on the steering wheel.

items.title: Horn works
items.description: Test the horn.

items.title: HVAC heats and cools
items.description: Enable heating and cooling from the display. Verify air comes from correct vents.

items.title: Audio system works
items.description: Play audio through the speakers. Verify all speakers work and listen for buzzing.

items.title: Wireless charging works
items.description: Place a Qi-compatible phone on the wireless charging pad and verify it charges.

items.title: USB ports functional
items.description: Test front and rear USB-C ports with a device.

items.title: Interior 120V outlet functional
items.description: Test the interior 120V power outlet. Verify it powers on from the display.

items.title: Overhead lights work
items.description: Test map lights and dome lights.

items.title: Ambient lighting works
items.description: Enable ambient lighting from the display and verify it illuminates correctly.

phases.title: Vault, Frunk, and Accessories
phases.description: Verify cargo areas, onboard power, and all accessories.

items.title: Vault floor undamaged
items.description: Inspect the vault floor and walls for scratches, dents, or damage.

items.title: Tonneau seals correctly
items.description: Verify the powered tonneau cover seals the vault completely when closed.

items.title: Two key cards present
items.description: Confirm two NFC key cards are included. Test both on the door pillar.

items.title: Phone key paired
items.description: Set up phone key in the Tesla app and verify it unlocks the vehicle.

items.title: Mobile Connector cable intact
items.description: Inspect Mobile Connector cable and adapters for damage.

phases.title: Drive and Final Verification
phases.description: Take a short test drive and complete final system checks.

items.title: Acceleration smooth
items.description: Test acceleration from stop. No shudder, hesitation, or unusual sounds from the drivetrain.

items.title: Braking smooth
items.description: Test brakes at low speed. No pulling, grinding, or pulsation.

items.title: Regenerative braking works
items.description: Verify regen braking engages on lift-off with expected deceleration.

items.title: Air suspension levels correctly
items.description: Test air suspension height adjustments including extract mode. Verify smooth height changes.

items.title: Steering straight with no pull
items.description: Drive straight and verify the truck tracks straight without pulling to one side.

items.title: No unusual vibration
items.description: Listen and feel for unusual vibrations from wheels, suspension, or drivetrain at various speeds.

items.title: No unusual noises
items.description: Listen for wind noise, rattles, or squeaks. Check for tonneau cover or tailgate rattles at speed.

items.title: Autopilot/FSD enables
items.description: Test Autopilot or FSD engagement on an appropriate road. Verify cameras are clean and unobstructed.

items.title: All cameras functional
items.description: Access the camera view on the display and verify all cameras display correctly.

items.title: GPS/Navigation accurate
items.description: Open navigation and verify GPS lock is acquired and location is accurate.

items.title: Software up to date
items.description: Check Software settings panel for current version and any pending updates.

items.title: Odometer reading reasonable
items.description: Verify odometer reading is low and consistent with a new delivery (under 50 miles typically).
